data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of not hiding slots within 48 hours, but the evidence does not confirm compliance with this requirement. The linked use case states that the coach can reduce hiding to 10% during slow periods, but there is no evidence that slots are not hidden within the 48-hour window. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not demonstrate adherence to the specified condition.
gaps: No evidence confirming that slots are not hidden within 48 hours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
